# Geo Digital Media (GeoDMus)

> Full-service digital media agency based in Chicago, IL. We build the digital infrastructure that grows businesses — websites, AI automation, marketing, and Web3 strategy. Done for you, every month.

## What We Do

Geo Digital Media (operating as GeoDMus) is a full-service digital agency and generative engine optimization (GEO) company. We help local businesses, startups, and multi-venture operators establish and grow their digital presence through a four-pillar service model.

### The Four Pillars

1. **Website Design & Development** — Fast, mobile-first websites that convert visitors into customers. From 5-page local business sites to full marketplace platforms. We don’t build websites — we build revenue engines.
1. **AI Automation & Systems** — Booking flows, SMS reminders, lead follow-ups, CRM integration, and agentic AI workflows. Your business runs 24/7 without adding headcount.
1. **Marketing & Social Media** — Email campaigns, social media management across all major platforms, and paid advertising. We keep your pipeline full so you can focus on the work.
1. **Web3 & Blockchain Strategy** — Crypto payment integration, NFT loyalty programs, token strategy, and blockchain consulting. We help businesses prepare for the on-chain future.

## Pricing

All services delivered as flat-rate monthly retainers. No hidden fees. No hourly rates. Cancel anytime after the initial 3-month commitment.

- **Launchpad — $799/month** — 5-page custom website, AI booking and automation setup, monthly email campaign, social media profile setup, Google Business optimization, monthly performance report.
- **Growth Engine — $1,599/month** — Everything in Launchpad plus full AI automation suite, 4 email campaigns per month, 3 social platforms managed 4x per week, CRM setup and integration, lead funnel build-out, bi-weekly strategy calls.
- **Empire Mode — $2,999/month** — Everything in Growth Engine plus custom website with no page limit, unlimited email campaigns, daily social management on all platforms, paid ads management, dedicated account manager, weekly strategy calls.

Custom and enterprise packages available. Contact hello@geodm.us.

## The Venture Ecosystem

Geo Digital Media is the digital backbone of a seven-venture portfolio. Every venture was designed, built, and managed in-house — proving the agency’s capabilities in production.

1. **GeoDMus / Geo Digital Media** — The flagship agency and operational hub for the entire portfolio.
1. **Premier Group** — Tax preparation, credit building, and real estate advisory for everyday families in Chicago.
1. **Juice Yoga Body** — Three-pillar wellness brand: signature lemonade, yoga content, and massage therapy.
1. **Creativo** — Events and production marketplace connecting local creative professionals with clients.
1. **Your Splashy Kicks (YSK)** — Community-first sneaker marketplace. Mobile-first, culturally embedded.
1. **Glow Guide** — Beauty influencer marketing platform matching nano and micro influencers with brands.
1. **SocialLens** — Open-source augmented reality protocol. The social identity layer of the physical world.

## Why Geo Digital Media

- One team owns everything — website, automation, marketing, and Web3 under one monthly retainer
- Built in Chicago, serving clients nationwide
- Bilingual — services available in English and Spanish
- Proven in production — every service has been deployed across our own seven-venture ecosystem
- GEO-native — actively optimizing for AI and generative engine discovery
- Transparent flat-rate pricing with no surprises and no long-term lock-in
- Fast execution — most websites live within 7–14 days of kickoff

## Industries Served

Hair salons, barbershops, medical spas, gyms, dental clinics, wellness brands, restaurants, real estate, financial services, law firms, e-commerce, coaches, creatives, startups, and Web3 projects.

## Technology Stack

HTML, CSS, JavaScript, AI automation (Zapier, ManyChat, custom agentic workflows), Stripe, Calendly, Metricool, Cloudflare, GitHub Pages, Web3 and blockchain integrations.
